name: guide_lds_referential_integrity
description: Use this tool to get detailed guidance on implementing referential integrity best practices in LWC components to make your code resilient against object/field name changes. Use this when you need to review Salesforce Record data access.

mode.description: The mode of the MCP tool. "fix" means the tool will fix the issues found in the code. "analysis" means the tool will analyze the code and respond with a SARIF report.
